system.description: Until start of your next turn: you are fully incorporeal — all Attack cards targeting you deal 0 damage (effects still apply); your melee attacks deal +RESONANCE × 2 bonus damage; you gain 1 Phantom Charge per enemy that attempts to attack you; and you may phase-move up to 15 meters as a free action once this turn. You are here and not here simultaneously. This is not evasion. This is what you are.
